scripts.mobile: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/components && npm run ios -w apps/mobile
scripts.mobile:setup: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run setup:ios -w apps/mobile
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/components && npm start -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev:peer2: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/components && npm run start:peer2 -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev:peer3: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/components && npm run start:peer3 -w apps/desktop
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/components && npm run build -w apps/desktop
